purpose: Document the heuristic conversion from SCIN condition metadata into DermaLens Local portfolio target labels.

default_behavior.note: Defaults preserve the original broad manifest behavior. Stricter experiments should set --min-label-confidence and --exclude-mixed-labels.

acne_like_texture.known_noise: Mixed acne/dermatitis/folliculitis presentations are common and should be audited.

rosacea_like_redness.known_noise: Redness can be confounded with dermatitis, lighting, flushing, and skin-tone representation.

dermatitis_like_irritation.known_noise: Psoriasis is visually heterogeneous; keep this broad label only for exploratory screening experiments.

signals: weighted label contains hyperpigmentation, melasma, pigment, or vitiligo
hyperpigmentation_like_uneven_tone.known_noise: Lighting and camera processing can mimic uneven tone.

folliculitis_like_bumps.known_noise: Often overlaps visually with acne-like inflammatory bumps.

signals: weighted label contains melanoma, carcinoma, or nevus
clinician_review.known_noise: This is an abstention/review bucket, not a lesion classifier.
